case_title: KELVIN F WONG VS. KARLO GARAGE DOORS & GATES, INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY WONG, KELVIN F AS TO DEFENDANT KARLO GARAGE DOORS & GATES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-17-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KELVIN F. WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARLO GARAGE DOORS & GATES, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF, HOWEVER REQUESTED COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU IS PRESENT.. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
